{{RewardIconWithText|Fighter's Legacy}} was a one time compensation for the conversion from the old [[Arena]] system to the new Arena system.

{{Retext|Use to gain random resources; small chance to get Green Organ Slime; higher chance to get Lottery Tickets or Mutantigen.|blue}}

The drop rates are:
* 5.43% {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad|orange}}
* 10.87% {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
* 16.30% {{RewardIconWithText|Gene Speedup}}
* 16.30% {{RewardIconWithText|Specimen}}
* 21.74% {{RewardIconWithText|Green Organ Slime|green}}
* 10.87% {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Organ Slime|blue}}
* 5.43% {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Organ Slime|purple}}
* 2.17% {{RewardIconWithText|Orange Organ Slime|orange}}
* 2.17% {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket|orange}}
* 5.43% {{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin|orange}}
* 3.26% {{RewardIconWithLink|Mutantigen|orange}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
